subject: [PATCH 5/6] mm/migrate_device: move softleaf_to_folio() inside device-private branch

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Approved the patch with Acked-by, indicating that it meets kernel coding standards and can be applied to the mainline tree.

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch moves the call to softleaf_to_folio() inside a device-private branch in mm/migrate_device.c, ensuring that the folio is only looked up when it's actually needed and preventing potential safety issues.
